meaning: n.充实,充满,全体会议,高压
examples: Seal plenum panel to vehicle interior.
Allison and George Poste, NATO ASI Series, Series A: Life Sciences Vol. 179, (ISBN 0-306-43386-9), 1989, Plenum Press, New York.
Amid all the talk of addressing the wealth gap, the party's plenum reiterated a commitment to rapid growth by restating a goal of raising China's GDP to double its 2000 level by 2010.
